queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical analysis of the protective effect of critical or multiple existing credit accounts on credit risk.
Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of loan duration in months on credit default probability.
